etymology.description: Depicts the tip of a blade дәЎ inside a knife еҲҖ
etymology.interpretation: The character еҢ„(gГ i) originally featured a blade tip within a knife structure, and it likely represented a concept related to sharpness or damage. Over time, it gave rise to other forms, including дёҗ(gГ i) (gГ i, "beggar") and еҢғ(gГ i), but its original meaning has largely been forgotten.
